predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state_name,
    AVG(fm.pearl_millet_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_pearl_millet_yield,
    AVG(fm.finger_millet_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_finger_millet_yield,
    SUM(fm.pearl_millet_production_1000tons) AS total_pearl_millet_production,
    SUM(fm.finger_millet_production_1000tons) AS total_finger_millet_production
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_millets fm ON dg.geography_id = fm.geography_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON fm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year BETWEEN 1966 AND 1970
GROUP BY dg.state_name;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.state_name,
    AVG(fm.pearl_millet_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_pearl_millet_yield,
    AVG(fm.finger_millet_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_finger_millet_yield,
    SUM(fm.pearl_millet_production_1000tons) AS total_pearl_millet_production,
    SUM(fm.finger_millet_production_1000tons) AS total_finger_millet_production
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_millets fm ON dg.geography_id = fm.geography_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON fm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year BETWEEN 1966 AND 1970
GROUP BY dg.state_name;
